core_functions.name: Seller listing and product catalogue
core_functions.description: Verified sellers can list art supplies with photos, descriptions, prices, and stock levels. Buyers browse and filter by medium, price, and region.
core_functions.why_needed: Core marketplace function — without this, no transactions happen. Solves the buyer pain of not finding curated local options.
core_functions.no_code_solution: Sharetribe Marketplace — handles listings, search, filters, seller profiles out of the box

core_functions.name: Secure checkout and local payment processing
core_functions.description: Buyers can pay using Fawry (Egypt), Mada (KSA), KNET (Kuwait), or credit/debit card. Order confirmation sent via WhatsApp and email.
core_functions.why_needed: International cards are a barrier for MENA buyers. Local payment rails directly address the 'payment friction' adoption barrier identified in market potential.
core_functions.no_code_solution: Sharetribe + Stripe (cards) + Fawry/Paymob API integration for local methods

core_functions.name: Seller onboarding and verification flow
core_functions.description: Sellers apply to join, submit product samples or photos, agree to quality standards, and receive a 'Verified Seller' badge upon approval.
core_functions.why_needed: Curation and trust are the core differentiators. Without verification, the platform is just another classifieds site.
core_functions.no_code_solution: Typeform for application form + Notion to manage review pipeline + manual badge assignment in Sharetribe

core_functions.name: Order tracking and WhatsApp notifications
core_functions.description: Buyers receive real-time order status updates via WhatsApp. Sellers get notified of new orders. Both parties can message through the platform.
core_functions.why_needed: WhatsApp is the dominant communication channel in MENA. Buyers expect status updates there, not email.
core_functions.no_code_solution: WhatsApp Business API (via Twilio or 360dialog) + Zapier to trigger on order events

core_functions.name: Seller analytics dashboard
core_functions.description: Sellers see views, clicks, conversion rate, revenue, and top products. Used to justify the premium subscription tier.
core_functions.why_needed: Needed to make the $29/month premium subscription valuable. Sellers won't pay without proof of value.
core_functions.no_code_solution: Sharetribe built-in analytics + Airtable or Google Sheets for seller reporting summaries

nice_to_have_functions.name: Creator community profiles and following
nice_to_have_functions.description: Buyers can follow artists, see their work-in-progress posts, and share their own creations. Builds stickiness beyond transactional use.
nice_to_have_functions.when_to_add: After 200 active monthly buyers — community features have no value in an empty market
nice_to_have_functions.trigger: Monthly active buyer count exceeds 200 AND repeat purchase rate reaches 25%

nice_to_have_functions.name: Peer critique circles
nice_to_have_functions.description: Small groups of artists share work and give structured feedback. Scheduled weekly sessions.
nice_to_have_functions.when_to_add: After community profiles launch and at least 50 creators have active profiles

nice_to_have_functions.name: Curated monthly supply box (subscription)
nice_to_have_functions.description: Founder curates a monthly box of 5-7 items from verified sellers. Buyers subscribe for automatic delivery.
nice_to_have_functions.when_to_add: After proving manual curation works at small scale (month 4+)
nice_to_have_functions.trigger: GMV > $10,000/month AND at least 10 verified sellers with consistent stock

future_capabilities.name: B2B supply channel for art schools
future_capabilities.description: University and school art departments order supplies in bulk at discounted rates. Separate B2B catalogue and invoicing.
future_capabilities.vision: Year 2+ — expands TAM beyond individual buyers into institutional procurement

future_capabilities.name: AI-powered style-based product recommendations
future_capabilities.description: Based on a creator's past purchases and shared work, the platform recommends supplies suited to their style (impressionist, abstract, etc.).
future_capabilities.vision: Year 2+ — requires significant purchase history and community data to be meaningful

feature_creep_warnings: Do NOT build a custom chat system — WhatsApp Business handles all communication needs for at least 18 months
Do NOT add a social feed or content wall before reaching 200 active users — it will be empty and embarrassing
Do NOT build custom logistics tracking — use seller-reported status + WhatsApp updates until GMV > $50K/month
Do NOT add a mobile app — a mobile-optimised Sharetribe site is sufficient for 18 months
Do NOT build custom payment infrastructure — Sharetribe + Paymob handles this without engineering

function_to_pain_map.pain_point: No trusted, curated local source for quality art supplies in MENA
function_to_pain_map.how_it_solves: Curated catalogue with verified sellers gives buyers a single trustworthy destination

function_to_pain_map.pain_point: International shipping cost and wait time; lack of local payment options
function_to_pain_map.how_it_solves: Local payment rails (Fawry, Mada) remove the card barrier; local sellers reduce shipping to 1-3 days

function_to_pain_map.pain_point: Low trust in online art supply quality — products look different from photos
function_to_pain_map.how_it_solves: Verification flow and badge system give buyers confidence before purchase

function_to_pain_map.pain_point: No communication channel buyers trust for order updates
function_to_pain_map.how_it_solves: WhatsApp notifications use the channel buyers already check 20+ times a day

function_to_business_model_map.connection: Every listing that converts to a sale generates the primary revenue stream
Verified sellers are the ones willing to pay for featured placement — verification is a prerequisite
Analytics dashboard is the primary value proposition of the premium tier

no_code_stack.purpose: Core marketplace — listings, search, checkout, seller profiles
Seller review pipeline and operations management
Connect Sharetribe events to WhatsApp notifications

summary: Five core functions cover everything needed to launch and monetise: listings, local payments, seller verification, WhatsApp notifications, and seller analytics. The no-code stack costs under $115/month total. Three nice-to-have functions (community, critiques, subscription box) are sequenced behind real adoption milestones — not launched speculatively. Four feature-creep warnings prevent the common trap of building social features before the marketplace itself has traction.
